steps.title: Identify the time relationship
steps.content: The first sentence reports Indonesia's urbanization from 2015–2020. The second sentence reports Southeast Asia's urbanization during the same five-year period. The key signal is that both trends are happening at the same time.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Concurrently means “at the same time.” This fits two parallel urbanization trends occurring during the same period.

The other three either suggest the second illustrates the first, imply a temporal sequence, or propose restating—none match simultaneous parallel trends.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
